description.zh-Hans: 使用可选的法线贴图、高度图和光照方向参数，对输入图像应用Blinn-Phong光照。支持平行光、点光源和半球光。为像素艺术素材生成逼真的3D着色。
description.en: Applies Blinn-Phong lighting to an input using optional normal map, height map, and light direction parameters. Supports directional, point, and hemisphere lights. Generates realistic 3D shading for pixel art assets.

triggers.zh-Hans: 光照, 光照效果, 法线贴图光照, Blinn-Phong, 方向光, 点光, 半球光
triggers.en: lighting, light effect, normal map lighting, Blinn-Phong, directional light, point light, hemisphere

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 使用法线贴图为像素艺术角色应用方向光照明。
exampleUsage.en: Apply directional lighting to a pixel art character using a normal map.
